repo_prior_art.cite: pid_ordinal_late_partial_defiers_v1: finite response-path sharpness; pid_iv_bounded_defier_envelope_v1: finite sharp sign-endpoint polytope

published_prior_art.cite: MogstadSantosTorgovitsky2018 and HanYang2024: finite MTE/PRTE LP bounds; MogstadTorgovitskyWalters2024: exact-PM multi-IV MTE bounds
BonnansShapiro2000: standard parametric optimization value sensitivity; MogstadTorgovitskyWalters2024 has exact PM but no eta-relaxation
Follows the same dual-price sensitivity logic as Conjecture 1 once the eta-perturbed LP is accepted

structure_flags.label: §13 Bibliography
structure_flags.one_line: JiangSun2023 is now Economics Letters 233 (2023), article 111400, not merely arXiv; HanYang2024 appears to be Journal of Econometrics 240(1), 105680, not 243(1--2).

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The support-function derivative is standard parametric-LP sensitivity once F(P,eta) is built; tier=field below novelty_target=flagship unless the draft strengthens this into a genuinely new sharp-bound/open-regime theorem beyond MTW exact PM.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: xi is called a signed outcome/margin variable, but c'xi<=eta is used as a nonnegative mass budget; without explicit nonnegative mass coordinates and no-cancellation constraints, eta=0 need not force xi=0.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: lambda_G is described as a dual block multiplying G(P)xi, but G(P)xi is a column contribution to an equality system, not a row block; the dual pairing and sign convention need to be stated precisely.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: sigma_cone(S)(lambda_G) is not aligned with the corollary's G(P)c pairing, and an unnormalized cone support function is generally 0 or infinity rather than a finite sensitivity measure.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Promote the flagship claim from a generic LP derivative to a sharp identified-set result for bounded PM violations, with explicit response-cell variables, nonnegative mass budgets, and a proof that the LP is sharp rather than conservative.
Add a comparison to standard parametric LP sensitivity theory and isolate the econometric novelty as the MTW response-cell cone construction, not the envelope theorem itself.
Replace the lambda_G notation with a full primal-dual display for U and L at eta=0, including the exact perturbation direction and signs for upper and lower endpoints.
Update the bibliography to published metadata for Jiang-Sun and Han-Yang and add DOIs for the closest JoE/AER/Econometrica comparators.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal to define the violation-cell LP rigorously and strengthen Conjecture 1 beyond standard LP sensitivity so it can plausibly meet the flagship floor.
